title: Is there a way to set a default time when a date is entered?
excerpt:
I want to sync my board with Outlook and for that I want to by default have a time added to any date so that the entry in outlook does not come through as a full day event. 
Is there any automation or formula that I can …

posts.author: DipaliPatankar (Dipali Patankar)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to sync my board with Outlook and for that I want to by default have a time added to any date so that the entry in outlook does not come through as a full day event.
Is there any automation or formula that I can do this?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! In the column settings, if you click on the 3 dots next to the column name, select “Settings” and then “Customize Date column”, this will give you the option to show a time by default:

I hope this helps, and please let us know if you have any other questions!

posts.author: DipaliPatankar (Dipali Patankar)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorry it does not as my question is how to set a default time when an item is created. For example I would like to set that each new item is set a start date of 2 days after the days of creation and the time is set to 09:00.
